fields.name: Activity Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the activity that the step belongs to.

fields.name: Step No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the step. The step number is unique within the activity.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the step. There are three options:

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the step.

fields.name: Priority
fields.tooltip: Specifies the priority of the step.

fields.name: Date Formula
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date formula that determines how to calculate when the step should be completed.
